title: Russian Grape Pie
description: A sweet and tangy pie inspired by Russian flavors, filled with a rich grape filling and topped with a crumbly crust.
instructions: Combine the flour, salt, and sugar in a bowl.
Add the crumbled salty fudge to the flour mixture and mix until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and butter.
Add the vanilla extract to the egg mixture and mix well.
Pour the egg mixture into the flour mixture and mix until a dough forms.
Roll out the dough on a floured surface to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
Place the dough in a pie dish and trim the edges.
Fill the pie crust with the grape filling.
Bake the pie for 40-50 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
Let the pie cool for 10 minutes before serving.
